title: Require human atomicity ratification
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: Only a registered human with an exact RATIFY_ATOMIC_BOUNDARY grant can approve, revise, or reject. Approval records selected and rejected alternatives, locked evidence, rationale, accepted risks, identity, and time; agent/code self-ratification is rejected.
acceptance_evidence: authority tests; approve/revise/reject tests; AtomicityRatification receipt

title: Compile a Draft Harness Model
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: After human boundary approval deterministic code compiles identity, production promise, input/output contracts, invariants, legal variation, capabilities, phase/runtime/evaluation/repair hypotheses, gaps, category ownership, and explicit not-applicable fields from the Source Lock plus declared-boundary input without semantic invention.
acceptance_evidence: golden deterministic model test; canonical hash; source-lock provenance

title: Mark the Draft Harness Model unratified
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: Every constitutional field carries authority and knowledge status. Boundary approval does not falsely ratify downstream constitutional hypotheses; required downstream consumption rejects fields without the required authority.
acceptance_evidence: field-status coverage test; downstream-consumption guard test

title: Expose gaps confidence and alternatives
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: The model preserves unresolved gaps, confidence, alternatives, decisions required, and explicit not-applicable markers. Empty or low confidence is never rendered as authority.

title: Freeze the ratified boundary for Genesis
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: An approved boundary is immutable for its version. Broadening merging splitting or same-version rewriting fails; a human reopen emits invalidation and requires a new boundary/model version before replacement.
acceptance_evidence: immutability tests; reopen and invalidation-chain test

title: Incorrect Atomic Harness Boundary
bounded_ST_02_05_interpretation: The Story receipt is invalid unless the boundary gate is explicitly PASS from authorized evidence. Contradiction, missing ratification, or invalidation makes the gate FAIL and blocks downstream use.
acceptance_evidence: positive and negative hard-gate tests; completion receipt gate disposition
